build: ios.sh xcodebuild -project ios.xcodeproj -scheme ios -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build
build:release: ios.sh xcodebuild -project ios.xcodeproj -scheme ios -configuration Release build
test: ios.sh xcodebuild -project ios.xcodeproj -scheme ios -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17' test
